log: REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster.
--- Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: 46/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:9+6=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: 33/67
--- Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 16] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 132/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: 11/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: -2/67
--- Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
